questions.question: BiteDash is an online food delivery platform.
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states that BiteDash is an online food delivery platform.

questions.question: BiteDash's current architecture is a monolithic one.
questions.explanation: The document mentions that the existing architecture of BiteDash is a single codebase, which is characteristic of a monolithic architecture.

questions.question: The monolithic architecture of BiteDash does not pose any scalability issues.
questions.explanation: The text mentions that the monolithic architecture suffers from scalability issues, particularly during peak hours.

questions.question: Deployments in BiteDash's monolithic setup are safe and do not risk the entire system.
questions.explanation: The document states that deployments in a monolithic setup are difficult and risky, as changes to one component can impact the entire system.

questions.question: BiteDash's growth has not led to any technical challenges.

questions.question: BiteDash is a platform serving millions of users.
